prompt: Interior of a wine bar at night. Long dark wood bar counter, bottles backlit on shelves, candles in wine bottles on tables, warm amber and teal-tinted lighting. A few cocktails and wine glasses on the bar, no people visible. Exposed brick walls, industrial pendant lights. Moody, intimate, cinematic. Shot from a low angle along the bar. Editorial interior photography, rich dark tones.

Three natural wine bottles on a dark shelf, backlit warmly. Different shapes and labels — one clear glass with amber wine, one dark with red, one with a hand-drawn label. Candle in a wine bottle nearby. Warm, organic, artisanal. Shallow depth of field. Editorial product photography, moody tones.

Bartender's hands muddling herbs in a mixing glass. Fresh rosemary, citrus peels on the bar. Copper jigger and bar tools visible. Warm backlight from bar shelves. Shallow depth of field, action and craft. No face visible, just hands and tools. Editorial food photography, warm dark tones.

Cozy corner of a wine bar. Small round table with two chairs, candle in a wine bottle, wine glasses. Exposed brick wall with a vintage framed print. Warm pendant light above. Intimate, date-night atmosphere. No people. Editorial interior photography, warm moody tones.

Close-up overhead of a dark bar surface with 4 different cocktails arranged artfully. One amber old fashioned, one ruby negroni, one pale wine spritz, one dark stout cocktail. Garnishes of citrus peel, rosemary, olives. Moody overhead lighting, dark background. Editorial food photography, rich dark tones.

Wine bar event setup — long communal table with wine glasses lined up for a tasting. Small cheese and charcuterie boards, candles, wine bottles. Warm amber lighting, exposed brick background. Empty, waiting for guests to arrive. Anticipation and atmosphere. Editorial interior photography, warm moody tones.

Wine bar set up for a private event. Communal table with place settings, wine glasses, candles in a row down the center. Charcuterie boards and bread. String lights above, exposed ceiling beams. Warm, celebratory but intimate. No people. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

Abstract close-up of wine being poured from a bottle into a glass. Deep red wine catching warm light, golden reflections. Shallow depth of field, dark background. Beautiful liquid motion frozen mid-pour. Editorial product photography, rich dark tones.

Close-up of a negroni cocktail in a rocks glass on a dark bar surface. Deep ruby red, large ice cube, orange peel garnish. Warm backlighting catching the drink. Dark background with soft bokeh from bar bottles. Elegant, moody. Square crop. Editorial product photography, rich dark tones.

Glass of orange wine held up against warm bar lighting. Amber-golden color, natural wine sediment visible. Hand visible holding the stem. Soft focus bar interior behind. Natural, unfiltered, authentic. Square crop. Editorial product photography, warm tones.

Classic dirty martini in a coupe glass on a dark surface. Pale golden-green color, olive on a pick. Clean, precise, elegant. Dark background with subtle warm reflections. Minimalist, sophisticated. Square crop. Editorial product photography, dark moody tones.

Smoked old fashioned cocktail in a heavy rocks glass. Amber liquid, large clear ice sphere, wisps of smoke still visible. Cherry and orange peel garnish. Dark wood bar surface, warm amber lighting. Dramatic and atmospheric. Square crop. Editorial product photography, moody tones.

Aperol spritz in a wine glass with ice. Bright orange color, slice of orange, bubbles visible. Set on a bar surface with warm evening light. Slightly lighter mood than the other drink photos — approachable, summery. Square crop. Editorial product photography, warm tones.

Tall highball cocktail with a botanical gin and tonic. Clear with slight color from garnish — cucumber ribbon, juniper berries, fresh herbs. Condensation on the glass. Dark bar background with warm reflections. Refreshing, elegant. Square crop. Editorial product photography, cool-warm tones.

View along a dark wood bar counter with 6 bar stools. Brass foot rail, pendant lights above. Bartender in soft focus at the far end. Bottles and glassware on shelves behind. Warm, inviting, mid-evening atmosphere. Slightly wider angle. Editorial interior photography, warm moody tones.

Floor-to-ceiling wine storage wall with wooden cubbies, each holding a bottle horizontally. Warm spotlight illuminating the labels. Dark surrounding walls, exposed brick. Beautiful and curated. A design feature of the space. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

Small tables and chairs in a wine bar. Mismatched vintage chairs, small round marble-top tables, candles. A window letting in blue evening light from outside. Cozy, curated, eclectic but cohesive. No people. Editorial interior photography, warm moody tones.

Close-up detail shot — a candle burning in an empty wine bottle on a bar table. Wax drips down the bottle. Wine glass beside it, soft reflection. Extremely shallow depth of field. Warm glow. Intimate, romantic detail. Editorial still life photography, warm dark tones.

Chalkboard menu on a brick wall with handwritten specials. Wine names, cocktail names, prices in white and colored chalk. Warm pendant light illuminating it from above. Authentic, imperfect handwriting. Charming, casual-sophisticated. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

View through the entrance doorway into the wine bar. Warm amber light spilling out, dark exterior frame. You can see the bar in the distance, pendant lights, silhouettes. Inviting, mysterious, atmospheric. Shot from outside looking in. Editorial photography, warm dark tones.

Wine bar exterior at dusk. A narrow storefront with a simple hand-painted sign, warm light glowing through a large window. A chalkboard menu board outside. Cobblestone or brick sidewalk. Urban, European-influenced, welcoming. Golden hour sky fading to blue. Editorial architecture photography, warm tones.

Two people behind a bar — a man in his mid-30s and a woman in her early 30s. He's wearing a dark apron, she's holding a wine glass up to the light examining the color. Both relaxed and knowledgeable. Warm bar lighting, bottles in background. Authentic, not posed. Editorial portrait photography, warm moody tones.

Man in his mid-30s, Mediterranean features, short dark hair, light stubble. Wearing a dark apron over a black shirt. Confident, easy smile. Bar background in soft focus with warm lighting. Natural, candid feel. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography, warm tones.

Woman in her early 30s, fair skin, short wavy hair. Wearing a dark linen top. Holding a wine glass casually. Warm, knowledgeable expression. Wine shelves in soft focus behind her. Natural lighting mixed with warm bar light. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography, warm tones.

Vineyard rows in golden morning light. Grapevines with clusters of dark grapes, green leaves. Rolling hills in the background, slightly misty. Natural, organic farming aesthetic — no machinery visible. Warm, earthy, pastoral. Editorial landscape photography, rich warm tones.
